feedback: EXCELLENT: Outgoing tab implementation in TransfersList is clean and follows existing patterns perfectly
EXCELLENT: Cancel functionality with confirmation dialog provides good UX - prevents accidental cancellations
EXCELLENT: Permission check in cancelRequest hook (lines 458-461) correctly validates only requester can cancel
EXCELLENT: Status validation ensures only pending transfers can be cancelled (line 217 showCancel prop)
EXCELLENT: Firestore rules for self-cancellation properly implemented (lines 281-292) allowing users to reject their own pending requests
EXCELLENT: 5 comprehensive E2E tests cover all critical scenarios - outgoing display, cancel button, status revert, permission enforcement, and status validation
EXCELLENT: RTL support is complete with proper dir handling in TransfersList component
EXCELLENT: All translations present for cancel functionality in both English and Hebrew
EXCELLENT: Cancel functionality properly reverts equipment status to 'serviceable' maintaining data consistency
GOOD: Module-level caching in useAssignmentRequests provides excellent performance when navigating back to transfers
GOOD: Real-time updates via onSnapshot ensure UI stays synchronized with database changes
MINOR: Firestore rule comment on line 282 has a typo - uses single '/' instead of '//' for comment
SUGGESTION: Consider adding optimistic UI updates when canceling to improve perceived performance
SUGGESTION: Add analytics tracking for cancel actions to understand usage patterns
nextSteps: Fix Firestore rules comment typo on lines 283 and 288 (single '/' should be '//')
Deploy and monitor the feature in production to validate real-world usage
Consider adding a cancel reason field (optional) similar to reject notes for better tracking
